inputs.label: Minutes
inputs.businessContext: Total duration in minutes to convert to hours

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the primary decimal hour output

inputs.label: Output Format (0=Decimal, 1=HH:MM)
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if output should be decimal hours (0) or hours and minutes (1)

inputs.label: Rounding Mode (0=Round, 1=Floor, 2=Ceil)
inputs.businessContext: Rounding method applied to the decimal hour output

formulas.primary: rndMode == 0 ? Math.round(inputMinutes/60 * Math.pow(10, decPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decPlaces) : (rndMode == 1 ? Math.floor(inputMinutes/60 * Math.pow(10, decPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decPlaces) : Math.ceil(inputMinutes/60 * Math.pow(10, decPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decPlaces))
